common.revidoTagline: We build custom AI tools for companies.

notFound.message: This page took a wrong turn.

hero.subtitle: A free, AI-first email client that triages your inbox, drafts replies in your voice, and runs agents on the busywork — so you only see what needs you.
hero.noSignup: No signup needed to explore the demo

trust.noTraining: Your mail never trains AI models

howItWorks.title: From chaos to calm in about a minute.

connect.title: Connect your inbox
connect.copy: Sign in with Google or Microsoft. One tap, read-only to start — nothing leaves your control.

read.title: We read & triage
read.copy: In about 30 seconds, every thread is summarized, sorted, and scored — the noise falls away.

agents.title: Agents handle the rest
agents.copy: Describe a rule in plain English — “forward receipts to accounting,” “chase no-replies,” “unsubscribe from the noise.” Preview it on real mail, then approve each time or let it run.

features.title: A calmer inbox, powered by agents.
features.subtitle: Consumer-warm on the surface, pro-tool fast underneath — every AI touch is marked with a sparkle.

triage.title: Smart triage
triage.copy: Every thread gets a one-line TL;DR, a category, and a priority score. Open your inbox already sorted.

replies.title: Replies in your voice
replies.copy: Drafts that actually sound like you — tone, phrasing, and sign-off learned from your sent mail.

agents.title: Agents, in plain English
agents.copy: Describe any rule and it compiles into a real workflow: label, archive, unsubscribe, draft, or forward. “Send every invoice to my bookkeeper” — done, attachments and all. Preview on your inbox, then auto-run or approve each.

chat.title: Chat with your inbox
chat.copy: Ask “what did I promise Priya?” or “find that $48k proposal.” Answers, with the receipts.

reminders.title: Proactive reminders
reminders.copy: It remembers the promises you made and the replies you’re still waiting on — before they slip.

privacy.title: Privacy-first
privacy.copy: Encrypted per user, zero-retention AI, open source. Your mail is yours — always.

privacy.title: Nobody reads your email.
privacy.subtitle: Not us. Not our models. Not anyone. Trust is the whole product.

encryption.title: Per-user encryption at rest
encryption.copy: Every mailbox is encrypted with its own key. Even we can’t browse your inbox.

zeroRetention.title: Zero-retention AI
zeroRetention.copy: Models summarize and draft in the moment, then forget. Your mail never trains anything.

openSource.title: Open source
openSource.copy: Don’t trust us — read the code. The whole client is out in the open.

delete.title: Delete everything, anytime
delete.copy: One button, provable purge. Disconnect and your data is gone for good.

footer.about: Built by Revido — we build custom AI tools for companies. Revido Mail is a taste of what bespoke agents feel like.
footer.aiMarked: Every AI action is marked, logged, and reversible.

oauth.startErrorRetry: Sign-in could not be started. Please try again.

onboarding.footer: Built by Revido · we build custom AI tools

appearance.title: Make it yours
appearance.subtitle: Pick a look for Revido Mail — you can change it anytime.

reading.title: Reading your recent mail…
reading.subtitle: Revido is triaging in real time

ready.title: Preparing your first brief
ready.subtitle: Everything’s sorted — here’s what we can take off your plate.

proposals.title: We found a few things we can automate
proposals.subtitle: Flip on the agents you’d like — you can change these anytime.
proposals.agentsCount_one: {{count}} agent will start working the moment you land.
proposals.agentsCount_other: {{count}} agents will start working the moment you land.

header.title: Settings
header.subtitle: Accounts, AI preferences, signatures, privacy and usage.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Choose how Revido Mail looks. System follows your device.
appearance.note: Your choice is saved to this browser.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the language used throughout Revido Mail.

accounts.supportNote: Gmail and Outlook supported. Your mail is end-to-end encrypted with a key only you hold.
accounts.disconnectNote: Disconnecting purges every message, draft and index we hold for this account.
accounts.disconnectDescription: This disconnects the account and permanently erases everything we store for it.
accounts.purgeDetail: Deleting your key cryptographically erases all your content, including backups — instantly and permanently. We couldn’t recover it even if you asked.

ai.title: AI preferences
ai.description: You’re always in control. Turn any of these off and the AI stays quiet.

drafts.label: Reply drafts
drafts.description: Pre-write replies in your voice so you can send with one tap.

agents.label: Inbox agents
agents.description: Let agents triage, file and chase in the background.

chat.label: Chat with inbox
chat.description: Ask questions across your mail and get grounded answers.

digest.label: Daily digest email
digest.description: A morning brief of what matters.

voiceProfile.title: Your voice profile
voiceProfile.description: Learned from your sent mail — greetings, sign-offs and how formal you get with each contact. Drafts sound like you, not a robot.

signatures.title: {{name}} signature
signatures.description: Appended to new mail. HTML is allowed.
signatures.empty: No signature yet. Connect an account to create one.

guarantees.encryption: Your mail is encrypted with a key only you hold.
guarantees.zeroRetention: AI runs on your inbox with zero retention — prompts and content are never stored or trained on.
guarantees.openSource: The client is open source. Audit exactly what runs.
guarantees.delete: Delete your key and every byte is provably, permanently gone.

notClaimed.noAds: We don’t sell or share your data — there is no ad model here.
notClaimed.noRead: We don’t read your mail. Agents act on it; humans at Revido never see it.
notClaimed.noBackdoor: We don’t hold a backdoor. There’s no recovery key on our side.

privacy.openSourceNote: Open source · zero-retention AI. The whole thing is auditable, and nothing you type sticks to a model.

deleteEverything.title: Delete everything
deleteEverything.description: Wipe every account, agent and byte we hold for you.
deleteEverything.dialogDescription: This erases all accounts, agents, drafts and indexes tied to your key.
deleteEverything.purgeDetail: Deleting your key cryptographically erases all your content, including backups — instantly and permanently.
deleteEverything.done: ✓ Everything deleted. Your key is gone.

usage.freePlan: You’re on the free plan — no limits today.
usage.freePlanDetail: {{name}}, everything above is on the house while we’re in early access. We’ll always warn you before anything changes.

talk.title: We built this. We can build yours.
talk.subtitle: Revido Mail is one example of what we make. Tell us the busywork eating your team’s week, and we’ll build the AI tool that ends it.

form.name: Name
form.automatePlaceholder: e.g. Chase overdue invoices, triage support mail, draft proposals from a call…
form.disclaimer: No pitch deck, no spam — a real reply from the people who build these.

footer.title: Built by Revido
footer.subtitle: We build custom AI tools for companies.

thankYou.title: Thanks, {{name}}.
thankYou.message: We’ll be in touch within one business day. Want to skip the wait? Grab a time and we’ll come prepared.
thankYou.footer: Built by Revido · we build custom AI tools for companies
